questions.stem:
Finance reconciles invoice deductions against purchase orders after month-end close and needs a repeatable control before the CFO review. The relevant feature area is **OneLake overview**.

What configuration best satisfies this requirement?

options.text: Configure OneLake overview so the team can meet the least operational overhead requirement without moving the decision into an unrelated service. for `sensor_events`
Rely on a ad hoc notebook copy instead of configuring OneLake overview for `sensor_events`
Rely on a nightly full rebuild instead of configuring OneLake overview for `sensor_events`
Rely on a dashboard-only filter instead of configuring OneLake overview for `sensor_events`

questions.explanation:
**A** is correct because `OneLake overview` is the documented capability tied to this scenario. It addresses least operational overhead without replacing the platform workflow with a manual workaround.

**B** is incorrect because the ad hoc notebook copy breaks lineage or repeatability when the workflow is rerun; it would not exercise the documented `OneLake overview` behavior needed here.

**C** is incorrect because the nightly full rebuild moves the control outside the certification service being tested; it would not exercise the documented `OneLake overview` behavior needed here.

**D** is incorrect because the dashboard-only filter does not expose the configuration point required by the scenario; it would not exercise the documented `OneLake overview` behavior needed here.

See [OneLake overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/fabric/onelake/onelake-overview) for the supporting documentation.
